fightr 0.1.0
  • Reference

    UFC Athlete Profiles and Career Statistics

    ufc_athletes.Rd

    A dataset containing UFC athlete-level profile information, career records, physical attributes, fighting styles, gym affiliations, and summarized performance statistics. Each row represents one athlete listed on the UFC athlete profile pages.

    Format

    A data frame with variables:

    name

    Character. Athlete name as listed in the dataset.

    nickname

    Character. Athlete nickname, where available.

    weight_class

    Character. Athlete's listed UFC weight class.

    url

    Character. URL for the athlete's UFC profile page.

    profile_name

    Character. Athlete name as shown on the UFC profile page.

    profile_nickname

    Character. Athlete nickname as shown on the UFC profile page, where available.

    status

    Character. Athlete status, such as `"Active"` or `"Not Fighting"`.

    place_of_birth

    Character. Athlete's listed place of birth.

    age

    Numeric. Athlete age in years, where available.

    height

    Numeric. Athlete height in inches, where available.

    weight

    Numeric. Athlete listed weight in pounds, where available.

    octagon_debut

    Date. Date of the athlete's UFC debut, where available.

    sig_strikes_landed

    Numeric. Total significant strikes landed in UFC competition.

    sig_strikes_attempted

    Numeric. Total significant strikes attempted in UFC competition.

    sig_str_landed

    Numeric. Significant strikes landed per minute.

    sig_str_absorbed

    Numeric. Significant strikes absorbed per minute.

    takedown_avg

    Numeric. Average takedowns landed per 15 minutes.

    submission_avg

    Numeric. Average submission attempts per 15 minutes.

    sig_str_defense

    Numeric. Significant strike defense rate, expressed as a proportion.

    takedown_defense

    Numeric. Takedown defense rate, expressed as a proportion.

    knockdown_avg

    Numeric. Average knockdowns landed per 15 minutes.

    average_fight_time

    Period. Athlete's average UFC fight time, where available.

    takedowns_attempted

    Numeric. Total takedown attempts in UFC competition, where available.

    fighting_style

    Character. Athlete's listed fighting style, where available.

    reach

    Numeric. Athlete reach in inches, where available.

    leg_reach

    Numeric. Athlete leg reach in inches, where available.

    takedowns_landed

    Numeric. Total takedowns landed in UFC competition, where available.

    trains_at

    Character. Athlete's listed gym or training affiliation, where available.

    wins

    Character. Athlete's listed career wins.

    losses

    Character. Athlete's listed career losses.

    draws

    Character. Athlete's listed career draws.

    standing_count

    Numeric. Number of significant strikes landed at distance.

    standing_pct

    Numeric. Proportion of significant strikes landed at distance.

    clinch_count

    Numeric. Number of significant strikes landed in the clinch.

    clinch_percent

    Numeric. Proportion of significant strikes landed in the clinch.

    ground_count

    Numeric. Number of significant strikes landed on the ground.

    ground_percent

    Numeric. Proportion of significant strikes landed on the ground.

    ko_tko_win

    Numeric. Number of wins by knockout or technical knockout.

    ko_tko_percent

    Numeric. Proportion of wins by knockout or technical knockout.

    dec_wins

    Numeric. Number of wins by decision.

    dec_percent

    Numeric. Proportion of wins by decision.

    sub_wins

    Numeric. Number of wins by submission.

    sub_percent

    Numeric. Proportion of wins by submission.

    Source

    UFC athlete profiles, https://www.ufc.com/athletes

    Details

    The dataset combines biographical information, official UFC profile fields, striking and grappling statistics, fight outcome summaries, and win-method breakdowns. Some fields may be missing when the information is unavailable from the source profile or when an athlete has limited UFC activity.

    Contents

    Developed by Benjamin Smith.

    Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
